rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF LEVETY YURITSY CHAVEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, although it is unclear whether the declaration of the court-appointed counsel for the former minor filed on 04/07/2023 was intended to be formal objections to the guardian's accounting and request for fees/costs (in which case notice must be given to the guardian's surety under Probate Code section 1213(a)(2)). It should also be noted that no proof of service was attached to the declaration. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF LEVETY YURITSY CHAVEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Approval Of Fees To Court-Appointed Attorney And Discharge Of Court-Appointed Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, despite the following issues: 1) The former minor's address listed on the proof of service is different from the address listed on the guardian's petition. 2) The guardian's address listed on the proof of service is P.O. Box. See Probate Code section 1215(a)(3). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RICHARD E. ANDERSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/3/23. (No earlier available date.) The register of actions indicates that a second amendment was just e-filed on 4/21/23. Deadline was 4/20/23 for delivering the courtesy copy of the second amendment to the examiner. Notice is defective if mailed before the actual e-filing of the pleading requiring notice and, in any event, neither 4/20/23 nor 4/21/23 was at least 15 days before this hearing. NB: Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.] Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 14.7 C.] New deadline is 6/22/23 for delivering the endorsed filed courtesy copy of the second amendment and correct proof of service of notice of the second amendment to the assigned examiner (plus any other new filed papers). Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARIE T. HALPIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/5/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) If an accounting is presented, original bank or brokerage statements must be filed to verify the ending balance(s) shown in the accounting. [LRSF 14.34 D.] See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts. (2) Notice must include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 5/22/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ELIZABETH KIRN BROZELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition For Court Determination Of Entitlement On Will With Interlineation Before Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/3/23. (No earlier available date.) (1) The petition is incomplete; no exhibit is attached. A verified supplement to the petition must be filed to provide the missing exhibit(s). (2) Notice must include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] (3) It appears that notice was not given to the surviving husband, who was listed in the petition as a party to receive notice. Deadline for delivering courtesy copies of the petition, supplement, and new proof of service to the assigned examiner is 6/22/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCINE MARIE DOUGLASS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/22/2023 (no earlier date available). 1) Notice must be given on the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-121. 2) The petitioner does not appear to have standing in his individual capacity. If the petitioner is opening this probate to pursue the creditor claim on file in his representative capacity as successor trustee, should a new petition be required to be filed by the petitioner in his trustee capacity and as a creditor, although the creditor claim was filed more than one year after the decedent's death and appears to be time-barred under Probate Code section 9352 and CCP section 366.2. Note: Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GEORGE DOWLER DICKINSON

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SUN WAH MOON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/3/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. (3) When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor through whom they take (or would have taken) shall be named and his or her date of death and relationship to the decedent shall be stated. [LRSF 14.18 C.] Whose child is the petitioner? (4) Who are or were the successors-in-interest to the post-deceased children? (5) Notice must be given to the successor-in-interest of each post-deceased child. (6) Notice must include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 6/22/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOEL HENRY SEIGNEUR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/12/2023. The following information must be filed at least seven days prior. (1) Explanation why photocopies of an LLC information and of a trust are attached to petition. The court is not inclined to review them unless petition provides a summary and reason for review. (2) Information if there has been (or will be) any Probate proceeding in Arizona. (3) Allegation if this will is validly executed pursuant to Prob. Code [PC] sec. 6113. The will was executed in another state. (4) Confidential statement of driver's license and birth date. LRSF 14.18.E. (5) Caption and body of the petition must clarify why the proposed personal representative is "administrator with will annexed" while the will nominates petitioner to act. PC 8420; 8440. (6) Petition to list all named executors and they must be noticed properly - Paul Vincent Curran. (7) Petition to list all named beneficiaries and they must be noticed properly - Andre Seigneur (8) Petition #5.(3)-(4) and (7)-(8) to be completed re: registered domestic partner and re: issue of a predeceased child. (9) Petition #8 to list all heirs at law, including anyone who is next of kin as #6.f being affirmed. Also, Petition #5.(5) alleges that the decedent was survived by natural or adopted child; however, #8 lists stepchildren only. #5 and #6 information appears contradicting. (10) Notice (DE-121 form) to be given anyone who has not been noticed. PC 8100 (11) Notice of Remote Appearance to be given to all persons who are entitled. :LRSF 14.1.D.(6). (12) Petition may address higher compensation (5%) provided by will. PC 10802.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAYMOND J. GIORDANI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/26/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No courtesy copies have been received by the examiner. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.] The petition was only cursorily reviewed online as a ONE-TIME courtesy. [LRSF 14.7 C.] (2) A written declination must be filed by or on behalf of an individual who is entitled to priority for issuance of letters of administration but does not desire to act. If the necessary renunciation or declination is not filed, the petition must indicate the reason. [LRSF 14.24.] (3) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. (4) Notice must include the instructions regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] Attaching a copy of the order rescinding the eleventh amended general order is not including the procedures for appearing remotely. Deadline is 6/14/23 for delivering courtesy copies to the assigned examiner of any papers filed to address these issues. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
